inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: Athlete's body weight in kilograms, used to estimate energy expenditure.

businessContext_i18n.en: Athlete's body weight in kilograms, used to estimate energy expenditure.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sporcunun kilogram cinsinden vücut ağırlığı, enerji harcamasını tahmin etmek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergewicht des Athleten in Kilogramm, zur Schätzung des Energieverbrauchs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel de l'athlète en kilogrammes, utilisé pour estimer la dépense énergétique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso corporal del atleta en kilogramos, utilizado para estimar el gasto energético.
businessContext_i18n.ar: وزن جسم الرياضي بالكيلوجرام، يُستخدم لتقدير استهلاك الطاقة

inputs.label: Workout Duration
inputs.businessContext: Total duration of the CrossFit workout in minutes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total duration of the CrossFit workout in minutes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: CrossFit antrenmanının dakika cinsinden toplam süresi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée totale de l'entraînement CrossFit en minutes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración total del entrenamiento CrossFit en minutos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المدة الإجمالية لتمرين الكروس فيت بالدقائق

inputs.label: MET Value
inputs.businessContext: Metabolic Equivalent of Task (MET) for the workout intensity. CrossFit typically ranges 6-12 METs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Metabolic Equivalent of Task (MET) for the workout intensity. CrossFit typically ranges 6-12 METs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Antrenman yoğunluğu için Metabolik Eşdeğer (MET). CrossFit genellikle 6-12 MET aralığındadır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Metabolisches Äquivalent (MET) für die Trainingsintensität. CrossFit liegt typischerweise zwischen 6-12 METs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Équivalent métabolique de la tâche (MET) pour l'intensité de l'entraînement. Le CrossFit varie généralement de 6 à 12 METs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Equivalente metabólico de la tarea (MET) para la intensidad del entrenamiento. CrossFit típicamente oscila entre 6-12 METs.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المكافئ الأيضي للجهد (MET) لشدة التمرين. يتراوح الكروس فيت عادة بين 6-12 MET

inputs.label: Gender Adjustment Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to adjust calories for gender differences (commonly 1.0 for males, 0.9 for females).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to adjust calories for gender differences (commonly 1.0 for males, 0.9 for females).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cinsiyet farklılıklarına göre kaloriyi ayarlamak için çarpan (genellikle erkekler için 1.0, kadınlar için 0.9).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator zur Kalorienanpassung für Geschlechtsunterschiede (üblich 1,0 für Männer, 0,9 für Frauen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour ajuster les calories en fonction du genre (généralement 1,0 pour les hommes, 0,9 pour les femmes).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para ajustar las calorías según diferencias de género (comúnmente 1.0 para hombres, 0.9 para mujeres).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مضاعف لتعديل السعرات الحرارية حسب الاختلافات بين الجنسين (عادة 1.0 للذكور، 0.9 للإناث)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
